# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it is a research preprint with clear empirical results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal arXiv manuscript that tests multiple mainstream multi-agent code generation systems with a fuzzing-based robustness pipeline, reports quantitative failure rates of 7.9%–83.3% after semantic-preserving mutations, identifies a dominant failure cause accounting for 75.3% of failures, and evaluates a repair method that resolves 40.0%–88.9% of identified failures and reduces found failures by up to 85.7%. This is real experimental evidence, not commentary or promotion.

## Limits
